2.label: Flick Up
2.description: Devices in this group will be controlled with the flick up gesture (uses Basic command class).

3.label: Flick Down
3.description: Devices in this group will be controlled with the flick down gesture (uses Basic command class).

4.label: Flick Left
4.description: Devices in this group will be controlled with the flick left gesture (uses Basic command class).

5.label: Flick Right
5.description: Devices in this group will be controlled with the flick right gesture (uses Basic command class).

6.label: Circular AirWheel
6.description: Devices in this group will change their level according to the circular AirWheel gesture (uses Multilevel Switch command class).

paramInformation.label: Device Orientation
paramInformation.description: Orientation of the Swipe in relation to its default position

paramInformation.label: Buzzer - Signalling Result of Gesture Recognition
paramInformation.description: Acoustic signalling of gesture recognition result (using the built-in buzzer). Relevant only if parameter 2 is set to 1.

options.label: Successful and failed recognition is signalled

paramInformation.label: Powering Mode Update Interval
paramInformation.description: How often the device checks if the USB power supply is connected and updates powering mode if needed

paramInformation.label: Power Saving Mode (Battery Mode)
paramInformation.description: Operation of gesture detection when battery powered

options.label: Swipe does not enter power saving mode

paramInformation.label: Hold Gesture to Enter the Menu
Toggle Mode for 2nd Association Group (Flick Up)
Toggle Mode for 3rd Association Group (Flick Down)
Toggle Mode for 4th Association Group (Flick Left)
Toggle Mode for 5th Association Group (Flick Right)
Rate of Smooth Level Control
paramInformation.description: How long the hand has to be held near the center of the pad after the AirWheel gesture for the associated devices to reach their maximum/minimum level

metadata.inclusion:
1. Move and hold your hand close to the center of the pad.
2. If the device is battery powered, a high pitched beep signals exiting standby mode.
3. A loud sound sequence confirms entering the menu. Keep holding your hand.
4. After hearing two short beeps and seeing the green indicator, withdraw your hand and perform a swipe up gesture to confirm the selection. Two beeps confirm validity.
5. Successful adding is confirmed by 3 short beeps and a green visual indicator.
metadata.exclusion:
1. Move and hold your hand close to the center of the pad.
2. If the device is battery powered, a high pitched beep signals exiting standby mode.
3. A loud sound sequence confirms entering the menu. Keep holding your hand.
4. After hearing two short beeps and seeing the green indicator, withdraw your hand and perform a swipe up gesture to confirm the selection. Two beeps confirm validity.
5. Successful removal is confirmed by a sequence of 2 short beeps, a pause, and 1 short beep with a red visual indicator.
metadata.reset:
1. Make sure the device is powered.
2. Choose the 3rd menu position, indicated by 3 short beeps.
3. After a few seconds the device restarts, signaled by a sequence of 2 short beeps, a pause, and 1 short beep with a red indicator.
